target: 7th Loop
2. Everyone Gathered?

Totsumura-san, you came.
Thank you.

But you're late.
What were you doing?
Well~, it just took a little time to style my hair...
Eeehhh!? U... Ushi... Ushio-cha...!
Waaayaaahhhhhh!!!
Sou already did that reaction earlier.
It appearedddddd!! A ghosttttttt!!
What a noisy man... Are you telling me to fight alongside this guy?
G-G-G-G-cupsss!!??
Is that... what you're surprised about?
K-K-K-Koyuba Kaoriiiii!!??
W-What is the meaning of this! Shinpei-kun, what in the world is this gathering!?
This is a waste of time. Ushio, show this man that quickly.

Right.
Totsumura-san, come here.
O-Oh...
Here, hold out your hand.
This is what has happened so far. And...
What might happen from now on.
Alright, that's it.
Totsumura-sa~n? Oh... he froze.
It's fine to leave him like that. It's nice and quiet.
Shinpei, what about the other person? You said you invited them, right.
About that, not yet... Sou, any reply from Tokiko-chan?
No... not yet.
You did send her a message, right?
I sent it before leaving the house and it was read. But there's no reply. I called a few times too, but she didn't answer.
I called too, but she didn't answer...
I wonder where Tokiko-chan is.
What is she doing! Tokiko is the one who really needs to see Ushio's memories...!
...Eh, no fair!! Tokiko-chan bailed!?
Hey Totsumura-san, don't put it like that!
B-But...! Fighting monsters like that is impossible!! I'm going home too!
I don't mind if you do, but――
See, this person is telling me I can go too...
But officer, even if you leave here, you will definitely die.
There's nowhere left to run.
Everyone on the island will die on the night of the festival. And trying to escape the island is useless. There are Shadows among the ferry staff too.
A-Are you serious...
If you're going to die anyway, at least show the spirit to fire a single bullet into the enemy.
D-Don't say such hopeless things...
Now then, Shinpei Ajiro. Do you still intend to wait for her?
We can't wait any longer. We have to make a plan with the people we have.
No way!?
T-Then what happens to Tokiko?
(Nezu-san is right. If we wait any longer, we'll fall behind on our initial move.)
(Haine must be probing for information through this mark on my arm too...)
Sou, Mio... It'll be dangerous if Tokiko-chan shows up during the battle. Let's tell her she doesn't need to come anymore.
J-Just a little longer! Can't we wait just a little bit longer!?
If Tokiko-chan is safe, we can show her Ushio's memories anytime.
That's true, but...
...Ugh.
Three more minutes. If she doesn't show up by then, give up.
Okay...
In the end... she didn't come, huh.
Yeah, it can't be helped.
Everyone, please double-check the plan and weapons we discussed earlier.
Shin-chan…
…It's okay, Mio.
(Mio probably would have felt more reassured if Tokiko-chan had come too, but...)
(She didn't make it in time...)
I'll be moving to my designated position.
Koyuba-san, you should also move to your planned location while you can.
But…
The enemy has the same looping ability as me. If they find out you're our ally, I can't guarantee we'll be able to protect you.
I'm sorry for dragging you into this. I'm glad you're helping us, but please make sure they absolutely don't see you.
Don't worry! Just leave it to the hero of justice here!!
U-Understood. Be careful, Ajiro-kun...
If I had just searched for Tokiko more thoroughly...
What's the point in regretting it? Focus more on what's in front of you.
Hizuru-san is right. Sou-kun, let's do our best too, okay?
Y-Yeah...
Just to check, by the way... Is there anyone who's thinking, 'I wanna run away~'?
If there is, I wouldn't mind escorting you to a safe place!?
There isn't anyone.
So cold!?
Hey, Tetsu-san... Can you really do this?
I-I can do it! I was just saying!!
You're lacking a sense of tension. Are you taking this seriously?
Come on, Shinpei. Times like this are exactly when you need to be firm with them!
No, it's fine. I'm not good at that kind of thing――
I'm sorry for being late!
Tokiko-chan!
I only just noticed the message from my brother...
It's fine. You came in the end, after all. Well then, Tokiko-chan is――
Don't, Shinpei!! That's a Shadow!!
Eh――
Toki... chan?
Goodbye, Shinpei-san.
Shinpei!!!!
Noooooooooo!!
Key TIPS [<color=#GF_KEY_TOK_KAGE>Tokiko's a Shadow!?</color>] obtained.
